description: Replace hex-nexus agent spawning with SpacetimeDB reducers and WebSocket subscriptions for distributed multi-host execution

phases.name: Add Workplan State Tables to SpacetimeDB

tasks.name: Add workplan_phase table
tasks.description: Add SpacetimeDB table: workplan_phase (execution_id, phase_name, status, gate_result, timestamps)
tasks.done_command: cargo check --package hexflo-coordination 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Add workplan_task table
tasks.description: Add SpacetimeDB table: workplan_task (execution_id, task_id, phase_name, status, agent_id, result, timestamps)
tasks.done_command: cargo check --package hexflo-coordination 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Add agent_task_queue table
tasks.description: Add SpacetimeDB table: agent_task_queue (task_id, assigned_agent, status, created_at) for WebSocket subscription
tasks.done_command: cargo check --package hexflo-coordination 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Add phase_start reducer
tasks.description: Reducer: transition phase to running, insert workplan_phase row, log to memory

tasks.name: Add task_spawn reducer
tasks.description: Reducer: create task in workplan_task, add to agent_task_queue, broadcast to subscribed agents

tasks.name: Add task_complete reducer
tasks.description: Reducer: mark task complete, update result, check phase gate

tasks.name: Add task_fail reducer for preemption
tasks.description: Reducer: mark task failed, enable reassignment on agent death

tasks.name: Add task subscription to hexflo-coordination
tasks.description: Add reducer to subscribe agent to agent_task_queue, receive tasks via WebSocket
tasks.done_command: cargo check --package hexflo-coordination 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Add task assignment WebSocket endpoint
tasks.description: Add endpoint to serve task subscriptions via axum WebSocket
tasks.done_command: cargo check --package hex-nexus 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Test agent receives task via WebSocket
tasks.description: Verify agent connects to WebSocket and receives task assignment

phases.name: Update Hexflo to Use DB Reducers

tasks.name: Update workplan_executor to use phase_start reducer
tasks.description: Modify execute_phase to call phase_start reducer via SpacetimeDB

tasks.name: Update task spawn to use DB reducer
tasks.description: Modify task spawning to call task_spawn reducer for distributed tracking

tasks.name: Update agent to receive tasks via WebSocket
tasks.description: Modify hex-agent to connect to SpacetimeDB WebSocket for task queue
tasks.done_command: ls hex-agent/src/main.rs 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: End-to-end DB-driven agent workflow
tasks.description: Run workplan with agents receiving tasks via SpacetimeDB WebSocket
